hero.name: Afsal Ahmed Khan A
hero.tagline: Turning ideas into apps, games, and AI-powered experiences.

about.bio: 2nd-year AIML student at Jerusalem College of Engineering, Chennai. Winner of Cipher Quest (1st Place) and PALS Think2Impact Jury Award. Participated in AMD Slingshot Campus Days, Cyber Connect Hackathon, and multiple AI innovation programs. Building Android apps, full-stack web products, AI systems, and Unity games.

achievements.title: AMD Slingshot Campus Days Ideathon Participant

projects.title: ARISE IRL
projects.description: Solo Leveling-themed calisthenics RPG Android app. Full gamification with XP, levels, quests, Supabase backend, and Gemini AI coaching.

projects.title: NeuroCart
projects.description: AI-powered adaptive shopping assistant built for AMD Slingshot Campus Days Chennai Hackathon. React + Vite + Supabase, deployed on Google Cloud Run.

projects.title: Magic Embroidery
projects.description: Production ecommerce site for a Chennai embroidery business. Full product catalog, cart, order flow, and admin panel.

projects.title: Aash Player
projects.description: Offline Android music player in Kotlin + Jetpack Compose. Pro equalizer, Mini Capsule overlay, Dynamic Light for Vivo, and lock screen controls.

projects.title: BrainOS
projects.description: Local Python AI app connecting Ollama LLM to an Obsidian vault via REST API. Tabs for chat, vault assistant, journal, search, and dashboard.

projects.title: Quantum Pulse
projects.description: Rhythm-based mobile game in Unity 6 with a custom beat-map system, dynamic visual effects, and mobile-optimized input.

timeline.title: 1st Place — Cipher Quest
timeline.description: Won the college-level competitive programming event.

timeline.title: Built NeuroCart — AMD Slingshot Hackathon, Chennai
timeline.description: Built NeuroCart, an AI-powered adaptive shopping assistant, in 24 hours. Deployed on Google Cloud Run.

timeline.title: Cyber Connect Hackathon
timeline.description: Participated and built secure web communication platforms.

timeline.title: PALS Think2Impact Jury Award Winner
timeline.description: Member of Team Phantom Vanguard. Won Jury Award for solving real-world industry challenges.

timeline.title: AMD Slingshot Campus Days
timeline.description: Built NeuroCart, an AI-powered adaptive shopping assistant using React, Supabase and AI workflows.

timeline.title: RYLA Leadership Program
timeline.description: Completed a 5-day leadership development and personal growth program.
